ddls:
CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier for the publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the publication was submitted */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Language of the publication */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the publication */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the publication */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the publication */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the publication (e.g., submitted, in review, published) */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date when the publication was published */,
  "journal_name" TEXT /* Name of the journal where the publication was published */,
  "issue" TEXT /* Issue number of the publication */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Volume number of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "code" TEXT /* ISO code for the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the author (e.g., institution) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* ORCID identifier for the author */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_authors" (
  "pub_author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the author-publication association */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order of authorship in the publication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the author in the publication (e.g., lead author, corresponding author) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_authors_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_authors_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the reviewer */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the publication */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Recommendation provided by the reviewer (e.g., accept, reject, major revisions) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewers" (
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reviewer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the reviewer */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the reviewer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the reviewer */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* ORCID identifier for the reviewer */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "editorial_decisions" (
  "decision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each decision */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "decision" TEXT /* Outcome of the editorial decision (e.g., accepted, rejected) */,
  "decision_date" TEXT /* Date when the decision was made */,
  "editor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the editor making the decision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("decision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_editorial_decisions_editor_id FOREIGN KEY ("editor_id") REFERENCES editors ("editor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_editorial_decisions_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citations" (
  "citation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication making the citation */,
  "cited_pub_doi" TEXT /* DOI of the cited publication */,
  "citation_date" TEXT /* Date when the citation was made */,
  "citing_author" TEXT /* Author of the citing publication */,
  "citing_title" TEXT /* Title of the citing publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the metrics record */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views for the publication */,
  "downloads" INTEGER /* Number of downloads for the publication */,
  "citations" INTEGER /* Number of citations received by the publication */,
  "altmetric_score" INTEGER /* Altmetric score for the publication */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Total citation count for the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission record */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication being submitted */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date of submission */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the submission (e.g., in review, published) */,
  "submission_type" TEXT /* Type of submission (e.g., new, revised) */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the submitted file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., submission, review, editorial decision) */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Read status of the notification (e.g., read, unread) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conflicts_of_interest" (
  "coi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the conflict of interest record */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication associated with the conflict */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user disclosing the conflict */,
  "conflict_description" TEXT /* Description of the conflict of interest */,
  "declaration_date" TEXT /* Date when the conflict was declared */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conflicts_of_interest_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conflicts_of_interest_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "editors" (
  "editor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each editor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the editor */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the editor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the editor */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* ORCID identifier for the editor */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the editor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("editor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "editorial_board" (
  "board_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the editorial board record */,
  "editor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the editor */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication managed by the editor */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the editor in the publication (e.g., lead editor, co-editor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("board_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_editorial_board_editor_id FOREIGN KEY ("editor_id") REFERENCES editors ("editor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_editorial_board_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the publication */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., submitted, in review, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_history_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration record */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collaborator */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication associated with the collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_collaborator_id FOREIGN KEY ("collaborator_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding" (
  "funding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding record */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "funder_name" TEXT /* Name of the funding agency */,
  "grant_number" TEXT /* Grant number for the funding */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of funding received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("funding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "licenses" (
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license record */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "license_name" TEXT /* Name of the license */,
  "license_type" TEXT /* Type of license (e.g., CC BY, CC BY-NC-ND) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_licenses_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., author, reviewer, editor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)
